text: 1 3 HYBRID Clutch plate and electrical steel laminations 80% of Steel Sold by Worthington to Automotive Market Supports Powertrain-Agnostic Parts *In North America, the average vehicle contains approximately 2,000 lbs of flat roll Steel (excluding the engine).

Applying Transformation to corporate functions Expanding electrical steel capabilities in Canada and Mexico Licensed ablation technology to open new opportunities for TWB Sitem acquisition strengthens global presence for electrical steel Strong Cash Flow Supports Growth Initiatives Note: FY is fiscal year ended May 31.
Deferred tax asset adjustment – Tempel’s electrical steel facility in Nagold, Germany was included as part of the purchase consideration for the Sitem Group acquisition.
Free Cash Flow is defined as operating cash flows less capital expenditures.
